offer: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient inventory management causes stockouts. We automatically order supplies based on historical consumption patterns instead of manual inventory tracking and ordering.
problem: Inefficient inventory management leading to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on inventory solutions
Direct message 20-50 restaurant owners with demo link
Join forums where restaurant owners share inventory tips
try_it: Let users try tracking consumption and confirming orders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequent inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminders for order confirmations
Allow CSV imports for existing inventory data
Enable one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
